characters.description: Michael B. JordanPortrayed byMichael B. JordanBiographical InformationBorn:1992Full name:AlexStatus:AliveResidence:Berkeley, CaliforniaOccupation:Soup Kitchen ManagerPhysical DescriptionGender:MaleHair color:BlackEye color:BrownRelationshipsSignificant Others:Haddie Braverman(ex-girlfriend)Character InformationFirst appearance:Seven NamesLatest appearance:Clear Skies from Here on OutAppearance Count:16Alex(portrayed byMichael B. Jordan) isHaddie Braverman's boyfriend during Season 2 and 3. He is also the manager of a local soup kitchen in Berkeley. Alex first met Haddie after being introduced to each other at the local soup kitchen in Berkeley by Camille Braverman, Haddie's grandmother, who volunteers there a bit. Alex was born into a broken home. His father is portrayed and told as being a hard alcoholic in the series when he then runs away from his abusive home and now full-time lives alone. We learn after Adam invites Alex to dinner at their home, he was emancipated at the age of 16, which is the same age that Haddie is when they were first introduced to each other. He became a legal adult at 16, and has been living like one ever since.

characters.name: Bob Little
characters.description: Bob LittlePortrayed by Jonathan TuckerBiographical InformationStatus:AliveResidence:Berkeley, CaliforniaOccupation:PoliticianMayor of Berkeley, CAPhysical DescriptionGender:MaleHair color:BrownEye color:HazelRelationshipsSignificant Others:Amber Holt(fling)Character InformationFirst appearance:MissingLatest appearance:I'm Still HereAppearance Count:10Bob Little(portrayed by Jonathan Tucker) isKristina Braverman's former political opponent in the campaign run for mayor of Berkeley, California. He also had a fling with Kristina's niece,Amber Holt. He wins the campaign after Kristina backs out. Bob Little is introduced in Season 3 when he employs Kristina to work below him on his campaign. She does well, and they become friends after Bob loses. Later, Amber starts working for Bob and a relationship develops between the two. Kristina finds out when they are caught making out in a hotel room, and she berates both of them. She bans Amber from seeing Bob.

characters.name: Gaby
characters.description: GabyPortrayed by Minka KellyBiographical InformationBorn:1980Full name:GabyStatus:AliveResidence:Berkeley, CaliforniaOccupation:Behavioral AidPhysical DescriptionGender:FemaleHair color:BrownEye color:BrownRelationshipsSignificant Others:Crosby Braverman(slept with)Character InformationFirst appearance:The Big 'O'Latest appearance:Taking The LeapAppearance Count:9Gaby(portrayed by Minka Kelly) is Max's behavioral aide. She helps outAdam BravermanandKristina Bravermanwhen they find out that their son,Max Braverman, is diagnosed withAsperger syndrome. She goes on to have an affair with Crosby and resigns out of guilt, and is seen working with Noel Lessing afterward. Gaby helps the family and helps Max take leaps and strides. She is very good with children and is responsible for Max's gradual social growth. Although Adam and Kristina were at first doubtful of her abilities, they see Max progress and grow to appreciate her greatly. Gaby becomes involved withCrosby Bravermanafter he goes through trouble with his fiancée Jasmine Trussell. The two end up sharing a connection, and although they promise not to become romantically involved because it would be wrong, they end up sleeping together on the night of Max's birthday party.

characters.description: Joe PestridgePortrayed by D.B. WoodsideBiographical InformationFull name:Dr. Joseph PrestridgeStatus:AliveResidence:Berkeley, CaliforniaOccupation:PediatricianPhysical DescriptionGender:MaleHair color:BlackEye color:BrownRelationshipsSignificant Others:Jasmine Trussell-Braverman(ex-girlfriend)Character InformationFirst appearance:Step Right UpLatest appearance:My Brother's WeddingAppearance Count:9Dr. Joe Pestridge(portrayed by D.B. Woodside) is the ex-boyfriend ofJasmine Trussell-Bravermanand the former pediatrician ofJabbar Trussell-Braverman. Dr. Joe first appears in Season 3 only asJabbar Trussell-Braverman's pediatrician. He andJasmine Trussell-Bravermanflirt in the doctor's office, which angersCrosby Braverman, who witnesses the whole thing. Jasmine insists it is nothing, but later accepts Dr. Joe's invitation to dinner. He and Jasmine subsequently start dating, and he also gets closer to Jabbar, upsetting Crosby. Dr. Joe makes sure that Crosby and Jabbar still have a strong father-son relationship, but Dr. Joe tells Crosby that he's here to stay because he loves Jasmine. Dr. Joe asks Jasmine to move in with him, and Jasmine considers saying yes. However, Jasmine decides to get back together with Crosby, and she tells Dr. Joe about her and Crosby's engagement, who wishes her the best.

characters.name: Lauren
characters.description: LaurenPortrayed by Tavi GevinsonBiographical InformationBorn:1995Status:AliveResidence:Ithaca, New YorkOccupation:Student (at Cornell University)Physical DescriptionGender:FemaleHair color:BlondeEye color:BlueRelationshipsSignificant Others:Haddie Braverman(girlfriend)Character InformationAppears in:The PontiacAppearance Count:1Lauren(portrayed by Tavi Gevinson) isHaddie Braverman's girlfriend from Cornell University. She is first introduced as Haddie's best friend in Season 5 when they both come to Berkeley from college for a visit. It is later revealed that the two are in a relationship when Haddie's brother,Max Braverman, walks in on the two kissing. Lauren and Haddie return from Cornell together. Lauren is first introduced as Haddie's "awesome best friend" because Haddie had not come out to her family yet. Max walks in on the two kissing in Haddie's bedroom, and Haddie decides to come clean. Later that night, Haddie comes out to her family. They tell her that they love her no matter what. Haddie returns to Berkeley for her aunt,Sarah's, wedding. She appears to be without Lauren. It is unknown whether the two broke up or Lauren was just unable to make it.
